name: Van Oord
description: Van Oord is a leading international contractor that specializes in dredging and marine engineering. The company offers innovative solutions for maritime challenges, including land reclamation and offshore wind park installation.

name: Ellicott Dredges
description: Ellicott Dredges is a global leader in dredging systems, having supplied over 2000 medium-sized cutter suction dredges to various customers worldwide. Notable projects include the delivery of multiple dredges for emergency needs and significant contributions to water supply efforts in Puerto Rico.

name: Muddy Water Dredging LP
description: The company is a leading provider of dredging services, particularly in muddy water environments, with a strong emphasis on operational performance, environmental quality, and safety.

name: Leader Dredger
description: The company, Leader Dredger, offers a range of dredging services including installation, testing, training, maintenance management, and technical assistance, highlighting their expertise in providing comprehensive support for dredging operations.

name: Dredgit Corporation
description: Dredgit Corporation specializes in critical infrastructure maintenance services across various sectors, including marine and environmental, which may encompass dredging-related activities. With a strong track record since 2011, they have successfully executed challenging projects for major clients like the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers and the U.S. Coast Guard.

name: Royal IHC
description: The company specializes in providing cost-efficient equipment and full-service solutions for the dredging industry, emphasizing their commitment to efficiency and sustainability. They offer comprehensive support, including design, engineering, and lifecycle management for integrated vessels and equipment.

name: Wasa Dredging
description: Wasa Dredging specializes in dredging and has over 35 years of experience, designing and manufacturing its own effective and reliable dredging equipment. With a modern fleet and a commitment to continuous learning, the company has successfully completed over 100 projects, positioning itself as a key player in the European dredging market.

name: Union Dredgers & Marine Cont Co LLC
description: Union Dredgers and Marine Contracting (UDMC) specializes in both small maintenance and long-term dredging contracts, emphasizing high-quality service and customer satisfaction. With a commitment to environmental sustainability and continuous innovation, UDMC ensures efficient and safe dredging operations.

name: Evergreen North America Industrial Services
description: Evergreen North America is a prominent service provider that offers specialized dredging services, among other environmental and industrial cleaning solutions. Their expertise in this area, along with a commitment to safety and advanced technologies, positions them as a reliable partner for addressing operational and environmental challenges.

name: Dredging Services
description: Marina Dredging Services specializes in dredging and desilting for ports, marinas, and waterways, using innovative mini-dredgers to efficiently remove sediment and silt. Their services ensure navigable depths and support environmental management, facilitating safe passage for vessels.
